mean_en: an official piece of paper on which a doctor writes the type of medicine you should have, and which enables you to get it from a chemist’s shop/drugstore
sentence: My doctor gave me a prescription to treat my heart disease.
sentence_trans: 医生给我开了一个处方来治疗我的心脏病。
word_etyma: pre预先 + script写 + ion名词后缀 → prescription处方
